name: @sponsio/scan-ts
description: DEPRECATED — merged into @sponsio/sdk.  Thin compatibility shim that forwards `sponsio` invocations to the binary in @sponsio/sdk so existing `npm install -D @sponsio/scan-ts` setups keep working until they migrate.
deprecated: @sponsio/scan-ts has been merged into @sponsio/sdk.  Run `npm install --save-dev @sponsio/sdk` and the same `sponsio` CLI is in @sponsio/sdk's bin field — drop the @sponsio/scan-ts dep.
